label: Run $ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name
command: set ErrorActionPreference SilentlyContinue ; eval "EXT=\"${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/zed/extensions/work/java\"; if [ \"$(uname 2>/dev/null)\" = \"Darwin\" ]; then EXT=\"$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; if [ -n \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" ]; then CYGP=$(cygpath -u \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n \"$CYGP\" ]; then EXT=\"$CYGP/zed/extensions/work/java\"; else EXT=\"$LOCALAPPDATA/zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; fi; \"\$EXT/task-bin/java-task-helper\" run-class \"$ZED_FILE\" \"${ZED_CUSTOM_java_package_name:-}\" \"$ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name\" \"${ZED_CUSTOM_java_outer_class_name:-}\" ; exit" ; set ErrorActionPreference Continue ; $Q=[char]34 ; iex "& $Q$env:LOCALAPPDATA\zed\extensions\work\java\task-bin\java-task-helper.exe$Q run-class $Q$env:ZED_FILE$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_package_name$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_outer_class_name$Q"

label: Run $ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name.${ZED_CUSTOM_java_outer_class_name:}.$ZED_CUSTOM_java_method_name
command: set ErrorActionPreference SilentlyContinue ; eval "EXT=\"${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/zed/extensions/work/java\"; if [ \"$(uname 2>/dev/null)\" = \"Darwin\" ]; then EXT=\"$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; if [ -n \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" ]; then CYGP=$(cygpath -u \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n \"$CYGP\" ]; then EXT=\"$CYGP/zed/extensions/work/java\"; else EXT=\"$LOCALAPPDATA/zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; fi; \"\$EXT/task-bin/java-task-helper\" run-test-method \"$ZED_FILE\" \"${ZED_CUSTOM_java_package_name:-}\" \"$ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name\" \"${ZED_CUSTOM_java_outer_class_name:-}\" \"$ZED_CUSTOM_java_method_name\" ; exit" ; set ErrorActionPreference Continue ; $Q=[char]34 ; iex "& $Q$env:LOCALAPPDATA\zed\extensions\work\java\task-bin\java-task-helper.exe$Q run-test-method $Q$env:ZED_FILE$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_package_name$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_outer_class_name$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_method_name$Q"

label: Test class $ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name
command: set ErrorActionPreference SilentlyContinue ; eval "EXT=\"${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/zed/extensions/work/java\"; if [ \"$(uname 2>/dev/null)\" = \"Darwin\" ]; then EXT=\"$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; if [ -n \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" ]; then CYGP=$(cygpath -u \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n \"$CYGP\" ]; then EXT=\"$CYGP/zed/extensions/work/java\"; else EXT=\"$LOCALAPPDATA/zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; fi; \"\$EXT/task-bin/java-task-helper\" run-test-class \"$ZED_FILE\" \"${ZED_CUSTOM_java_package_name:-}\" \"$ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name\" \"${ZED_CUSTOM_java_outer_class_name:-}\" ; exit" ; set ErrorActionPreference Continue ; $Q=[char]34 ; iex "& $Q$env:LOCALAPPDATA\zed\extensions\work\java\task-bin\java-task-helper.exe$Q run-test-class $Q$env:ZED_FILE$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_package_name$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_class_name$Q $Q$env:ZED_CUSTOM_java_outer_class_name$Q"

label: Run tests
command: set ErrorActionPreference SilentlyContinue ; eval "EXT=\"${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/zed/extensions/work/java\"; if [ \"$(uname 2>/dev/null)\" = \"Darwin\" ]; then EXT=\"$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; if [ -n \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" ]; then CYGP=$(cygpath -u \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n \"$CYGP\" ]; then EXT=\"$CYGP/zed/extensions/work/java\"; else EXT=\"$LOCALAPPDATA/zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; fi; \"\$EXT/task-bin/java-task-helper\" run-all-tests \"$ZED_FILE\" ; exit" ; set ErrorActionPreference Continue ; $Q=[char]34 ; iex "& $Q$env:LOCALAPPDATA\zed\extensions\work\java\task-bin\java-task-helper.exe$Q run-all-tests $Q$env:ZED_FILE$Q"

label: Clear JDTLS cache
command: set ErrorActionPreference SilentlyContinue ; eval "EXT=\"${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/zed/extensions/work/java\"; if [ \"$(uname 2>/dev/null)\" = \"Darwin\" ]; then EXT=\"$HOME/Library/Application Support/Zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; if [ -n \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" ]; then CYGP=$(cygpath -u \"$LOCALAPPDATA\" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n \"$CYGP\" ]; then EXT=\"$CYGP/zed/extensions/work/java\"; else EXT=\"$LOCALAPPDATA/zed/extensions/work/java\"; fi; fi; \"\$EXT/task-bin/java-task-helper\" clear-cache ; exit" ; set ErrorActionPreference Continue ; $Q=[char]34 ; iex "& $Q$env:LOCALAPPDATA\zed\extensions\work\java\task-bin\java-task-helper.exe$Q clear-cache"
